slice.text: TRULICITY (dulaglutide) is indicated as an adjunct to diet and exercise to improve glycemic control in adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus.

GLP-1 receptor agonists (including dulaglutide, semaglutide, liraglutide) are covered under Medi-Cal managed care prior authorization when ALL of the following criteria are met: (1) diagnosis of type 2 diabetes mellitus; (2) HbA1c ≥7.5% documented within the past 6 months on maximum-tolerated metformin monotherapy; (3) documented trial of an SGLT2 inhibitor (e.g., empagliflozin, dapagliflozin, canagliflozin) for a minimum of 90 consecutive days OR documented contraindication or intolerance to all SGLT2 inhibitors. Requests that do not include SGLT2 inhibitor trial documentation or a documented contraindication will be denied as incomplete.

locator.section: Section 4 — Endocrine Agents, GLP-1 Receptor Agonists, Prior Authorization Criteria

slice.text: Dulaglutide 0.75 mg/0.5 mL subcutaneous injection (4-pack, 28-day supply) — NADAC unit acquisition cost: $748.22 per pen (CMS NADAC weekly file, 2026-Q2). Cost Plus benchmark: $720.00 per pen.
